mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT y FROM ( SELECT `year` AS y FROM budget_monthly UNION SELECT CAST(LEFT(`year_month`, 4) AS UNSIGNED) AS y FROM monthly_summation UNION SELECT YEAR(CURDATE()) AS y ) t WHERE y IS NOT NULL ORDER BY y ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget_monthly (csp, year, month, project_cd, budget, currency) VALUES (#{csp}, #{year}, #{month}, #{projectId}, #{budget}, #{currency}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE budget = VALUES(budget), currency = VALUES(currency), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT ms.year_month COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS yearMonth, 'AWS' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS csp, COALESCE(SUM(ms.total_cost), 0) AS bill FROM monthly_summation ms WHERE ms.csp = 'AWS' AND ms.year_month >= CONCAT(#{year}, '01') AND ms.year_month <= CONCAT(#{year}, '12') AND ms.project_cd = #{projectId} GROUP BY ms.year_month
UNION ALL
SELECT vm_latest.demand_month COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS yearMonth, 'NCP' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS csp, COALESCE(SUM(vm_latest.demand_amount), 0) / ${krwPerUsd} AS bill FROM ( SELECT n1.demand_month, n1.demand_amount, n1.instance_no FROM ncp_cost_vm_month n1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT instance_no, demand_month, MAX(write_date) AS latest_write_date FROM ncp_cost_vm_month WHERE demand_month >= CONCAT(#{year}, '01') AND demand_month <= CONCAT(#{year}, '12') GROUP BY instance_no, demand_month ) n2 ON n1.instance_no = n2.instance_no AND n1.demand_month = n2.demand_month AND n1.write_date = n2.latest_write_date ) vm_latest INNER JOIN servicegroup_meta sm ON vm_latest.instance_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sm.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND sm.csp_type = 'NCP' AND sm.service_cd = #{projectId} GROUP BY vm_latest.demand_month
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.usage_date, '%Y%m') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS yearMonth, 'Azure' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS csp, COALESCE(SUM(a.pre_tax_cost), 0) / ${krwPerUsd} AS bill FROM azure_cost_vm_daily a INNER JOIN servicegroup_meta sm ON a.vm_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sm.vm_uid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND sm.csp_type = 'AZURE' AND sm.service_cd = #{projectId} WHERE a.usage_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '0101') AND a.usage_date <= CONCAT(#{year}, '1231') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(a.usage_date, '%Y%m')
UNION ALL
SELECT ms.year_month COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS yearMonth, 'GCP' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS csp, COALESCE(SUM(ms.total_cost), 0) AS bill FROM monthly_summation ms WHERE ms.csp = 'GCP' AND ms.year_month >= CONCAT(#{year}, '01') AND ms.year_month <= CONCAT(#{year}, '12') AND ms.project_cd = #{projectId} GROUP BY ms.year_month
ORDER BY yearMonth ASC, csp ASC
